---
name: Validator Onboarding
about: Request to join the NexaRail testnet as a validator
title: "[VALIDATOR] <moniker>"
labels: validator, testnet
assignees: ''
---

**Validator moniker**
Your validator's display name.

**Contact**
- Discord handle:
- Email (optional):
- GitHub handle:

**Infrastructure**
- Server spec: [e.g., 4 vCPU, 8 GB RAM, 200 GB SSD]
- Location: [e.g., Frankfurt, Germany]
- Sentry architecture: Yes / No

**Experience**
Brief description of your Cosmos / Tendermint validator experience.

**Agreement**
- [ ] I understand this is a testnet with no monetary value
- [ ] I will follow the testnet code of conduct
- [ ] I will participate in governance voting
- [ ] I accept the testnet may be reset at any time
- [ ] I will not make mainnet claims about testnet participation
